label: in
documentation: Declare an input stream, Optional type annotation can be provided.

label: out
documentation: Declare an output stream, Optional type annotation can be provided.

label: Map.get
documentation: Returns the value associated with the given key in the map, or null if the key does not exist.

label: aux
documentation: Declare an auxiliary stream, Optional type annotation can be provided.

label: dynamic
documentation: Permitting continual updates to the value of an expression

label: update
documentation: Returns expr1 until the first time step that expr2 is not deferred ⊥, after which it returns expr2 thereafter. Useful for evolving specifications without restarting the monitor
